---
id: test-installation
title: "Test installation"
description: "Test if an installation's credentials are still valid. This attempts to authenticate with the external service."
sidebar_label: "Test installation"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Test installation"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/installations/{id}/test"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Test if an installation's credentials are still valid. This attempts to authenticate with the external service.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Installation ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Simple status response","properties":{"status":{"example":"ok","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Missing installation ID","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"404":{"description":"Installation not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"503":{"description":"Credentials invalid or service unavailable","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
